headline: MARKET WRAP — May 30
telegramText: Weekend brief — tradfi data reflects Fri 2026-05-29 close. Crypto data is live. MARKET WRAP — May 30, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Tech-led risk rotation dominated as growth themes overwhelmed defensive positioning amid cyclical momentum. Copper miners joining the bid reinforced the reflation narrative while utilities and staples saw sustained selling pressure. Setup suggests further testing of growth versus defensive dynamics as institutional flows search for direction.
